name: Knowledge Asset (K-NFT)
description: Single structured knowledge unit minted through TrueMark with embedded certification
example: Expert method, SOP, research insight, proprietary formula
implications: Licensable at granular level; supports micro-royalties and derivative creation
edge_case_handling: Orphaned content auto-archived after 7 years of inactivity; requires minimum content completeness score

name: Heirloom Asset (H-NFT)
description: Personal or family knowledge asset designed for preservation and inheritance
example: Family recipes with stories, oral history with photos, personal memoir
implications: Immutable once sealed; transferable via will or smart-contract inheritance
edge_case_handling: Multi-generational key rotation required; emotional value weighting in valuation

name: Legacy Asset (L-NFT)
description: Aggregated multi-unit knowledge asset forming a long-term legacy record
example: Complete business playbook + training library + compliance archive
implications: Can bundle K/H-NFTs; supports succession planning and enterprise handoff
edge_case_handling: Requires minimum 5 linked units; aggregation must maintain license chain integrity

name: Enterprise Asset (E-NFT)
description: Organizational knowledge system structured for licensing and operational deployment
example: Corporate training system + compliance matrix + operational playbook
implications: White-label capable; supports volume licensing and internal deployment
edge_case_handling: Audit log must remain attached indefinitely; supports role-based access controls

name: Certificate Preview Asset (C-NFT)
description: Non-production artifact used for preview demonstration and onboarding
example: Demo version of a K-NFT for sales calls or client previews
implications: Expires after 30 days unless upgraded to full asset
edge_case_handling: Never mintable as final asset; watermarked and usage-logged

name: Master Template Asset (M-NFT)
description: Reusable blueprint for generating derivative assets at scale
example: Standard operating procedure template, contract framework, training outline
implications: Derivatives inherit parent license terms automatically
edge_case_handling: Template updates propagate only with explicit consent from original issuer
